name: Medal of Honor: Allied Assault War Chest
aliases: Medal of Honor Allied Assault War Chest

install_dir_names: Medal of Honor - Allied Assault War Chest
Medal of Honor Allied Assault War Chest

post_apply_message:
Medal of Honor: Allied Assault War Chest (2002, GOG, DRM-free) — Apply adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34 and drops a widescreen autoexec.cfg into main/.

WIDESCREEN: the recipe writes main/autoexec.cfg with seta r_mode "-1", r_customwidth 1280, r_customheight 800 and cg_fov 100 — 16:10 for the Deck's native panel. idTech3 runs autoexec.cfg every launch, so it sticks without the usual read-only trick. Do NOT change the resolution from the in-game menu or it overrides these until the next launch. On a 16:9 external screen, bump cg_fov toward 106-115.

EXPANSIONS: this is the War Chest, so Spearhead (moh_spearhead.exe) and Breakthrough (moh_breakthrough.exe) are here too — each reads its OWN autoexec.cfg from maintt/ and mainta/ respectively. The recipe only widescreens the BASE game (main/). Say the word and I'll add the expansion configs and separate shortcuts.

CONTROLLER: idTech3 has no native pad support — use a Steam Input layout (there are community MoHAA templates) to map a controller to keyboard+mouse.
notes: Built 2026-07-21 from Tony's GOG copy staged at NAS _games/'Medal of Honor - Allied Assault War Chest' (goggame markers present — DRM-free, delisted from sale so squarely in the abandonware lane). Root exes: MOHAA.exe (base, 1.5MB — the launch target), moh_spearhead.exe + moh_breakthrough.exe (expansions), Configure.exe (sets video options). idTech3 (Quake 3) engine: widescreen via r_mode -1 + r_customwidth/height + cg_fov, delivered as main/autoexec.cfg (authored by us — plain cvar text, not copyrighted). autoexec.cfg beats editing main/configs/unnamedsoldier.cfg because it re-applies every launch. FOV math: default 80 is 4:3; ~100 is right for 16:10 (1280x800). copy_files backs up any existing autoexec.cfg as .gfm-orig. Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED on hardware as of build.
